task_completion.description: Verify that the coupon code 'CLOTHING-DEAL' has been entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'CLOTHING-DEAL' in the main 'Coupon code' input field at the top of the coupon creation page.

task_completion.description: Verify the discount type is 'Fixed cart discount' and the amount is $20.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'General' tab of the Coupon data box, the 'Discount type' dropdown should display 'Fixed cart discount' and the 'Coupon amount' field should contain '20' or '20.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the minimum spend requirement is set to $75.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Usage restriction' tab of the Coupon data box, the 'Minimum spend' field should contain '75' or '75.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Exclude sale items' option is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Usage restriction' tab, the checkbox next to 'Exclude sale items' must be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the coupon is restricted to the 'Clothing' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Usage restriction' tab, the 'Product categories' input field should contain a tag or selection for 'Clothing'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the coupon has been successfully published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Coupon updated.' or 'Coupon published.' success message at the top of the screen, or verify the 'Publish' button in the right sidebar has changed to 'Update'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to create the coupon.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser displaying the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin), not a terminal window running WP-CLI commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of typing, dropdown selection, and checkbox clicking within the WooCommerce web interface, rather than just inspecting elements or editing HTML.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by running scripts or echoing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be visible inside the actual WooCommerce form fields. There should be no open terminal windows executing curl requests or wp-cli commands to create the coupon.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The coupon code must be exactly 'CLOTHING-DEAL'. The discount type must be 'Fixed cart discount' (fixed_cart) with an amount of '20.00'. The minimum spend must be '75.00'. The 'Exclude sale items' checkbox must be checked. The product category restriction must be set to 'Clothing'.
